Comment: The form is clear and quick to complete.
Search works, but category labels should be clearer.
I could not easily see whether my claim was approved.
Need clearer explanation for location field.
Useful because I do not need to ask many chat groups.
Admin screen is useful but needs a clearer filter for pending items.
Claim process is not obvious from the detail page.
I like the confirmation message after submission.
Location filter helps but should include building names.
Dashboard is helpful for prioritizing reports.
The required-field warning is easy to understand.
The system should not show student phone numbers publicly.
